column1: # Single-app partition table for 8 MB flash (XIAO ESP32-S3 / respeaker-pod).
# No OTA slots — single factory image only. OTA is a future milestone.
# Layout (offsets auto-assigned by esp-idf after the 0x8000 partition table):
#   nvs      : 24 KB  — NVS key-value store (WiFi creds
#   phy_init : 4 KB   — RF calibration blob (esp-idf internal)
#   factory  : 4 MB   — application image; current image ~1.18 MB
#                        comfortable headroom for this milestone and beyond.
